allow: Bash(cmd.exe /c "for %f in \(D:\\Work\\dev-inspector\\src\\*.js D:\\Work\\dev-inspector\\vue\\*.vue D:\\Work\\dev-inspector\\vue\\*.jsx D:\\Work\\dev-inspector\\react\\*.jsx D:\\Work\\dev-inspector\\index.js\) do @echo %~zf %f")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-ChildItem -Path ''D:\\Work\\dev-inspector'' -Recurse -Include ''*.js'',''*.jsx'',''*.vue'' | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch ''\\.git'' } | Select-Object Name, @{N=''KB'';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB,1\)}} | Sort-Object KB -Descending | Format-Table -AutoSize")
